description_long: This shotgun features a sleek, modern design with a predominantly black finish and metallic accents. The body is streamlined with parallel grooves running along the length of the receiver and barrel, giving it a tactical appearance. A prominent optical sight is mounted on the top rail, suggesting enhanced aiming capabilities. The grip is angled and ergonomic, with a trigger guard that is rounded and slightly elongated for finger protection. The barrel is single and cylindrical, with a short muzzle and no visible venting or ribbing. The overall construction appears robust, likely intended for urban tactical use.
description: A modern, black tactical shotgun with a single barrel, optical sight, and ergonomic pistol grip. The design is streamlined with metallic accents and a rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, optical sight, pistol grip, and detailed grooves along the body.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the single barrel opening, optical sight alignment, and narrow profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the first, with clear visibility of the grip, trigger guard, and sight.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the optical sight, grip, and the shotgun's overall symmetry.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, cylindrical with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded and elongated, medium size, smooth with no finger grooves
